UNAUTHORIZED: You need to sign in to continue.
FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
CONFLICT: That conflicts with something that already exists.
VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check the form and try again.
UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
OTP_RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
APPROVAL_TIER_NOT_FOUND: That approval tier no longer exists.
PLANT_GROUP_NOT_FOUND: That plant group no longer exists.
INVALID_PLANT_REFERENCE: One or more selected plants no longer exist.
DUPLICATE_NAME: That name is already in use.
RESOURCE_GROUP_NOT_FOUND: That resource group no longer exists.
INVALID_CALENDAR_REFERENCE: The selected calendar no longer exists.
INVALID_RESOURCE_REFERENCE: One or more selected resources no longer exist.
INVALID_RESOURCE_GROUP_REFERENCE: One or more selected resource groups no longer exist.
DUPLICATE_PART_NO: That part number is already in use.
DUPLICATE_CERTIFICATION_CODE: That certification code is already in use.
SCHEDULE_VERSION_NOT_FOUND: That schedule version no longer exists.
OPTIMIZER_RUN_FAILED: The scheduling run failed. Please try again.
SCHEDULE_INFEASIBLE: The schedule is infeasible — some demand can't be produced (no routing or eligible resource).
NO_DEMAND_TO_SCHEDULE: There is no active demand to schedule for this plant.
CHANGE_SET_INVALID: That change references something that no longer exists.
WHATIF_INFEASIBLE: The change can't be scheduled — no feasible option.
WHATIF_RESULT_NOT_FOUND: That what-if result no longer exists.
GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
